steps.title: Use the margin of error
steps.content: A margin of error gives a plausible interval around the estimate. Subtract and add $1.84\%$ from the estimate $9.2\%$.

steps.title: Calculate the interval
steps.content: Compute the lower and upper bounds. $$9.2-1.84=7.36$$ $$9.2+1.84=11.04$$ So it is plausible that the defective rate is between $7.36\%$ and $11.04\%$. The answer is B.
